creator: supdrewin@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Hans Petter Selasky from comment #1)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

ugen0.2: <Realtek 802.11n NIC> at usbus0

rtwn0 on uhub0

rtwn0: MAC/BB RTL8812AU, RF 6052 2T2R

...
